race.comment: YELLOWJACKET (9) can break through here. Three runs this time in have all been strong, perhaps just finding the mile a bridge too far in the Listed Adelaide Guineas last time when swamped late. She still stuck on well for third there and she's well placed back to benchmark grade here. THE VOLTA (6) has been running on well this time in, finding the line nicely behind a potential star in Concord Connie last week at Flemington. She'll be hard to hold out. AMEDEI (4) beat YELLOWJACKET home in the Adelaide Guineas in an encouraging effort. She might not be quite as well suited back in trip as that horse but she's got upside. MISS REVEALING (8) has been thereabouts in three runs this campaign, chasing home well in the Mornington Guineas last time when third. She draws for a nice run. TWO TO TANGO (13) also ties in with the Concord Connie fun and is in the mix.
